codeReview.summary: Reviewed the worker handoff, transcript skeleton, and the snippet-library commit that introduced the snippets library screen, editor/delete flows, multiline body persistence, search, and visible host/tag metadata. The implementation matches the feature description and VAL-SNIPPET-001 through VAL-SNIPPET-005 without any high-confidence correctness defects in scope.

summary: Pass. The reviewed feature cleanly replaces the snippets placeholder with a local snippet library and editor flow, persists multiline bodies and host/tag metadata through the repository layer, and includes focused instrumentation coverage for the required empty-state, persistence, validation, cancel/delete, and search behaviors.
